module.name: lpub3d

commands: (if test -f src/${LP3D_UTILS}/update-config-files.sh; then chmod a+x src/${LP3D_UTILS}/update-config-files.sh && cd src && bash ${LP3D_UTILS}/update-config-files.sh mainApp; fi)

post-install: cp -a builds/check ${FLATPAK_DEST}/build_staging/ && echo "Check bundle copied to ${FLATPAK_DEST}/build_staging/check."
